questionSelectionRules.name: Core - Basic Case Information
questionSelectionRules.description: Always include basic case information questions as foundation for any interview

actions.reason: Basic case information forms the foundation of every interview

questionSelectionRules.name: Core - Relationship Origin
questionSelectionRules.description: Always include relationship origin questions as they establish how the relationship began

actions.reason: Understanding how the relationship began is critical for authenticity assessment

questionSelectionRules.name: Core - Relationship Timeline
questionSelectionRules.description: Always include relationship timeline questions to verify relationship progression

actions.reason: Timeline consistency is essential for relationship verification

questionSelectionRules.name: Core - Marriage Intent and Intent
questionSelectionRules.description: Always include marriage decision and intent questions

actions.reason: Marriage motivation and immigration intent must be honest and clear

questionSelectionRules.name: Core - Wedding and Petitioner Information
questionSelectionRules.description: Always include wedding details and petitioner information

actions.reason: Wedding details verify marriage authenticity and petitioner is the legal sponsor

questionSelectionRules.name: Long Distance Relationship
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when couple is living apart

actions.reason: Long-distance relationships require more scrutiny on communication patterns, daily life synchronization, and relationship commitment

questionSelectionRules.name: Previous Marriage - Beneficiary
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when beneficiary was previously married

actions.reason: Previous marriages require detailed background verification, family acceptance re-assessment, and clear documentation of divorce/annulment

questionSelectionRules.name: Previous Marriage - Sponsor
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when sponsor was previously married

actions.reason: Sponsor's previous marriage may affect financial obligations, child support, and household composition assessment

questionSelectionRules.name: Visa Refusal History
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when there's a previous visa refusal

actions.reason: Visa refusal history requires detailed explanation of what changed, supporting evidence of changed circumstances, and clarification of refusal reasons

questionSelectionRules.name: Visa Overstay History
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when there's visa overstay history

actions.reason: Visa overstay is a serious violation requiring full explanation with evidence of compliance commitment and circumstances preventing departure
Criminal history requires full disclosure, documentation of rehabilitation, and detailed explanation of circumstances and consequences

questionSelectionRules.name: Military/Defense Background
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when there's military or defense service

actions.reason: Military/defense service triggers additional security screening and background verification requirements
Shared finances demonstrate financial interdependence, commitment, and integrated household planning

questionSelectionRules.name: Met Spouse's Family
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when beneficiary has met spouse's family

actions.reason: Meeting spouse's family demonstrates relationship integration, family acceptance, and relationship depth

questionSelectionRules.name: Frequent Communication
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied when couple communicates daily or very frequently

actions.reason: Daily communication pattern demonstrates strong ongoing relationship commitment and active engagement

questionSelectionRules.name: Employment and Financial Stability
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied to verify employment and financial capacity for supporting beneficiary

actions.reason: Petitioner's employment and financial stability are critical for I-864 Affidavit of Support requirements

questionSelectionRules.name: US Travel Experience
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied to assess travel history and familiarity with US

actions.reason: Travel history and US familiarity help assess credibility and commitment to immigration plan

questionSelectionRules.name: Future Plans and Home Country Ties
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied to assess commitment to US immigration and ties remaining at home

actions.reason: Understanding future plans and remaining ties helps verify genuine intent to immigrate and establish US residence

questionSelectionRules.name: Household Life and Family Integration
questionSelectionRules.description: Applied to verify household planning and family relationships

actions.reason: Household planning demonstrates practical integration and relationship authenticity through daily life organization
